temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A young boy with shaggy brown hair, wearing a striped sweater, stands in a dimly lit room. He holds a large, black, curved knife with a red handle, examining it closely. The room is decorated with vintage items, including a red television set to his left and a vanity table with a mirror to his right. A warm lamp on the vanity provides the main source of light. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and unsettling mood, introducing a young boy with a potentially dangerous object, creating immediate suspense.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to play, heightening the tension.)
(00:04-00:05) The boy lifts the large knife, holding it up in front of his face as if inspecting it. The camera angle shifts slightly, revealing more of the room's cluttered and dated decor, including a small plant and a framed picture on the wall. (Storyline: The boy's action of lifting the knife suggests he is contemplating its use, increasing the sense of impending danger.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous, suspenseful music continues.)
